RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: Double Star 1 and 2, also known as Explorer 1/2 or Tan Ce 1/2 (TC 1/2) , is a European-Chinese (PRC) (ESA-CNSA) two-satellite joint mission. Double Star 1 is an equatorial orbiter, while Double Star 2 is a polar orbiter. The Project Scientist for Double Star is Philippe Escoubet of ESA/ESTEC.

InformationURL.Name: Double Star Home Page
InformationURL.Description: Information about the Double Star mission

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
